raw_reaction: 天晴れだ　生涯貴様を忘れることはないだろう
reason: It handles the original stopping time exactly, proves E[tau]=sum P(S_n<=1)=sum 1/n!, and turns the ordered-prefix simplex calculation into a genuine symmetric-Fock/coherent-state norm interpretation. The abstraction has proof value and memorability rather than just decorative terminology.
